description: Product Description CAREX HANDWASH - SENSITIVE Ingredients The formulation comprises Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, and Glycerin, supplemented by Polyquaternium-7, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Lactic Acid, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Propylene Glycol, and CI 60730, each contributing distinct properties and functionalities to the product.
